title: O'Neill School establishes Jumper Fellowship to support future leaders in international affairs
summary_en: O’Neill School establishes the Dr. Roy and Mary Ruth Jumper Fellowship to support MIA students and honor a legacy of public service and international affairs.
title_cn: 奥尼尔学院设立贾珀奖学金 支持国际事务领域未来领袖

title: O'Neill School recognizes 2026 Alumni Award winners
summary_en: O’Neill School announces 2026 Alumni Award winners, honoring graduates for leadership and impact in public service, education, and national defense.
title_cn: 奥尼尔学院表彰2026年度校友奖获奖者
summary_cn: 近期，印第安纳大学奥尼尔学院举办2026年度校友奖表彰活动，正式确定并公布本年度校友奖获奖人员名单，对相关获奖人员予以公开表彰。该奖项为奥尼尔学院设立的重要校友荣誉，旨在表彰在各自从业领域作出突出贡献的学院往届毕业生，评审工作严格遵循学院既定工作规则，经规范程序产生最终获奖人选。
